task_completion.description: The BMW27 scene is loaded in Blender.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender application is open and the BMW27 scene is visible, evidenced by the car model in the 3D viewport or 'BMW27' in the window title or Outliner.
The 'Camera' object is highlighted/selected in the Outliner panel or actively selected in the 3D Viewport.

task_completion.description: The Graph Editor is open and displaying camera rotation channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graph Editor workspace or area is open, displaying the animation channels (specifically X and Z Euler Rotation) for the Camera.

task_completion.description: A Noise modifier is applied to the X Euler Rotation channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graph Editor, the X Euler Rotation channel is selected, and the Modifiers panel (usually on the right side, N-panel) shows a 'Noise' modifier added to it.

task_completion.description: A Noise modifier is applied to the Z Euler Rotation channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graph Editor, the Z Euler Rotation channel is selected, and the Modifiers panel shows a 'Noise' modifier added to it.

task_completion.description: The Noise modifier parameters are adjusted for a realistic shake.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Noise modifier panel shows Scale and Strength parameters adjusted to realistic values (e.g., Scale between 2-100, Strength between 0.005-0.2).

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'handheld_cam.blend', or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/handheld_cam.blend'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Blender's menus, Graph Editor, and modifier panels rather than just running a Python script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Blender application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the authentic Blender 4.2 interface being used, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass GUI interaction by executing a pre-written script.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent simply pasting a complete Python script into the terminal or Blender's text editor to instantly solve the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the official BMW27.blend scene. The target object is 'Camera'. The target channels for the Noise F-Curve modifiers are X Euler Rotation (rotation_euler.0) and Z Euler Rotation (rotation_euler.2). Realistic parameter ranges for the Noise modifier are Scale 2-100 and Strength 0.005-0.2. The expected output path is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/handheld_cam.blend.
